summary: Iteration 17: All 5 new features tested successfully. Backend 100% pass rate (11/11 tests). Frontend UI verified for all features and regression tests passed.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: <button> cannot contain a nested <button> - ServerAssign button nested inside table button

feature_1_pulse_tab_number.backend: GET /api/pulse/entries/today returns tab_number for each entry
feature_1_pulse_tab_number.frontend: PulseEntryPage shows #tab_number next to guest name (e.g., Maria Lopez #124)

feature_2_table_server_assignment.backend: POST /api/table/assign-server accepts table_id and server_name, returns previous server. GET /api/table/tables returns server_name.
feature_2_table_server_assignment.frontend: Occupied tables show server name as clickable button, dropdown shows barmen list (Carlos Silva, Ana Perez, Marco Rossi)

feature_3_manager_funnel_drilldown.backend: GET /api/manager/funnel-detail returns results for stages: entries, allowed, tabs_open, tabs_closed
feature_3_manager_funnel_drilldown.frontend: Clickable funnel stages open drill-down modals with guest details, tab numbers, server names

feature_4_tables_by_server.backend: GET /api/manager/tables-by-server returns servers array with tables grouped, plus unassigned
feature_4_tables_by_server.frontend: Manager sidebar has 'Tables by Server' tab showing tables grouped by server with revenue

feature_5_ai_insights.backend: POST /api/owner/ai-insights generates real AI insights using GPT-5.2 with venue context
feature_5_ai_insights.frontend: Owner 'AI Insights' tab has Generate button, shows insight cards with Summary, What We See, Recommended Actions, priority badges (CRITICAL, WARNING, INFO), and disclaimer

regression_tests.manager_overview: PASS - KPIs (Revenue Today/Week/Month, Avg Ticket, Unique Guests, Open Tabs, Tabs Closed, Voids), Charts (Revenue by Hour, Top 10 Items), Guest Funnel all visible
regression_tests.owner_overview: PASS - KPIs (Revenue Today, MTD, YTD, Growth, ARPU, Retention, Guests Today, Open Tabs, Tabs Closed, Avg Ticket), Venue cards visible

critical_code_review_comments: TablePage.js has nested button elements causing React hydration warning - ServerAssign button is nested inside table card button. Consider using a div with onClick instead of button for the outer element
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features (Pulse tab_number, Table server assignment, Manager funnel drill-down, Tables by Server, AI Insights) are working. The assign-server endpoint was tested and changes server assignment successfully. AI Insights uses real GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations and takes 10-15 seconds to generate. Demo data has 3 guests (John Smith #123, Alex Turner #126, Kevin Brown #125) and 2 occupied tables (T2, T3).
ai_insights_note: AI Insights feature uses REAL GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations - NO MOCKING. Response time is 10-15 seconds.
